caption: In a dimly lit studio setting with purple accent lights, a man and a woman are seated in wooden chairs facing each other. The man, on the left, has dark curly hair and a beard, wearing a white long-sleeved button-down shirt. The woman, on the right, has blonde hair tied back and is wearing a black t-shirt with white text that reads "S IN YOUR". Between them and slightly in front of the man sits a white, rectangular electronic device. Throughout the sequence, the man remains relatively still, looking toward the woman. The woman is actively speaking and gesturing with her hands; she starts with her hand near her chest, then brings both hands together in front of her. Her facial expressions shift from a smile to a more serious, focused look as the conversation progresses.
